text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you okay, Sato? Are you tired?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. I just zoned out a little bit. I'm
completely fine...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You went to the trouble of inviting me out, so
let's have all the fun we can today!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
P-please, stop! I'm begging you! You're going to
take this arcade for all it's worth!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
S-Sato! Snap out of it! You've already won all of
the prizes! This battle's already over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she doesn't let it show, Satono
Diamond's busy race schedule has really tired her
out...
